data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for service and provider restrictions.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement regarding 'service and provider restrictions'. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm the existence or functionality of these restrictions. The linked use case mentions this need but lacks the necessary details to assert its implementation, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of service and provider restrictions.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
